name: viewport-selection-dim
description: Viewport polish (2026-05-30) — selection-dim invariant. When the selection set is non-empty, every non-selected node's FadeState alpha drops to ~0.28; selected nodes have no fade entry (null = full alpha). Switching selection from A → B inverts the dim state (A becomes dimmed, B becomes bright). Verifies the dim is universal (no profile gating) and tracks selection changes through the SELECTION_SET subscriber's rebuildFadeState. Picks two real node ids from `__canaryListNodes` instead of hardcoding so the test works against whichever default boot graph is loaded.

commands: (async () => { window.__canaryApplyProfile('standard'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); const list = window.__canaryListNodes(); if (!list || list.ok !== true) throw new Error('listNodes failed: ' + JSON.stringify(list)); const nodes = list.value; if (!Array.isArray(nodes) || nodes.length < 2) throw new Error('expected ≥2 nodes in boot graph for the dim cycle, got: ' + nodes.length); const idA = nodes[0].id; const idB = nodes[1].id; const fade = (id) => window.__canaryGetNodeFadeAlpha(id).value; const a0 = fade(idA); const b0 = fade(idB); if (a0 !== null) throw new Error('baseline: expected ' + idA + ' fade null (no selection), got: ' + a0); if (b0 !== null) throw new Error('baseline: expected ' + idB + ' fade null, got: ' + b0); window.__canarySelectNode(idA); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const a1 = fade(idA); const b1 = fade(idB); if (a1 !== null) throw new Error('A-selected: expected ' + idA + ' fade null (it is the selection), got: ' + a1); if (b1 === null) throw new Error('A-selected: expected ' + idB + ' to be dimmed but got null (selection-dim not firing). Hint: confirm SELECTION_SET subscriber rebuilds FadeState. nodes(' + nodes.length + ')=' + nodes.slice(0,5).map(n => n.id).join(',')); if (b1 > 0.5) throw new Error('A-selected: expected ' + idB + ' dimmed (~0.28), got: ' + b1); window.__canarySelectNode(idB); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const a2 = fade(idA); const b2 = fade(idB); if (b2 !== null) throw new Error('B-selected: expected ' + idB + ' fade null (it is the new selection), got: ' + b2); if (a2 === null || a2 > 0.5) throw new Error('B-selected: expected ' + idA + ' dimmed (~0.28) — should have flipped from bright to dim, got: ' + a2); return 'pass: A-sel→' + idA + '=null,' + idB + '=' + b1.toFixed(2) + ' | B-sel→' + idA + '=' + a2.toFixed(2) + ',' + idB + '=null'; })()
